properties.Test Case: It should not be possible to push any kind of bubble so far that you can't get it back
properties.Steps: It should not be possible to push any kind of bubble so far that you can't get it back

properties.Test Case: Add a bubble with the tip that goes to a corner of the image box. Using "Change Layout", add more panels so that the tip is now off the page. When you toggle "Change Layout" off, the bubble should heal so that the tip is back on the image.
properties.Steps: Add a bubble with the tip that goes to a corner of the image box. Using "Change Layout", add more panels so that the tip is now off the page. When you toggle "Change Layout" off, the bubble should heal so that the tip is back on the image.

properties.Test Case: Dragging a new bubble onto the canvas should select it (and deselect whatever was previous selected)
properties.Steps: Dragging a new bubble onto the canvas should select it (and deselect whatever was previous selected)

properties.Test Case: Create a page that contains: a) a custom style, b) an image, c) custom page layout, d) a talking Book Recording e) a video. Copy/Paste the page within the book. -- Verify all styles, page layout, images, and Talking Book recordings, and videos are preserved.
properties.Steps:
Create a page that contains: a) a custom style,  b) an image, c) custom page layout, d) a talking Book Recording e) a video. 
Copy/Paste the page within the book.
-- Verify all styles, page layout, images, and Talking Book recordings, and videos are preserved.

properties.Test Case: Verify that changing the source or the duplicate page one does not modify the other (cropping image, changing audio, etc).
properties.Steps: --  Verify that changing the source or the duplicate page one does not modify the other (cropping image, changing audio, etc).
